mechanism: The 10-20 day identification lag in formal regime-switching models makes the three-category taxonomy (surprise / telegraphed-wrong-footed / telegraphed-correctly-positioned) practically valuable: if you cannot detect regime shifts quickly, knowing whether the transition is likely to be a surprise, telegraphed with wrong positioning, or telegraphed with correct positioning determines hedging strategy.
regime_dependence: Most relevant during transition periods when real-time detection matters; less relevant during stable vol regimes
